Combine all ingredients in a large rondeau
Bring to a boil over high heat
Once boiled, start stirring with a large rubber spatula.  After ~5 minutes of stirring, reduce heat to medium.
Continue stirring, careful not to break the rice, until 10% of liquid remains
Cover with the rondeau lid and remove from heat.
Allow to cool to room temp, residual heat and moisture will finish cooking process.
Reserve to sheet trays and cool in the blast chiller
Reserve to hotel pans in the cooler for service.
